roadmap_items: Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - canonicalize materialized A2UI action order so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep contract assertions synchronized with the canonical action ordering behavior.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - preserve stable fallback rendering for the same structured payloads.
scope_goal: Canonicalize materialized A2UI action order in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic, and keep the contract assertions aligned with that ordering.
tasks_completed: Updated the A2UI materialization path in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py to sort filtered actions by canonical JSON before rendering.
Added contract coverage in tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to verify the canonical ordering behavior for materialized action payloads.
Rewrote the lane metadata to match the actual canonical-ordering change and its matching assertions.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI) - agent emits structured presentation artifacts that remain consumable by CLI first, then Exegesis Console, then future Studio UI.
Capability 4: Operator-first control surface - CLI remains a first-class surface for deterministic fallback rendering.
